since_last: 51% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.84%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -0.88% · Gold +0.60% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 51% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.84%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.84%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LRCX is the standout at -6.55%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.81%, WDAY +3.51%, NOW +3.50%, SAP +3.18%, INTU +2.52%. Laggards: LRCX -6.55%, AMAT -6.42%, KLAC -6.23%, TER -5.87%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.28% at $159.97
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
